name: Leriland
tactics_notes: Level 1 Rogue with no spellcasting. Priority action each turn is triggering Sneak Attack (1d6 bonus) — use Shortbow from range or Shortsword/Dagger in melee when an ally is within 5 ft of the target (or when advantage is available). Shortbow and Shortsword are the main offensive weapons; both use DEX and qualify as finesse/ranged for Sneak Attack. Two daggers available as backup melee or thrown (same +5/1d4+3 profile). Expertise in Sleight of Hand (+7) and Stealth (+5) support ambush and setup plays. Unarmed strike is a last resort only.
